message:
fix(extensions-js): replace is_multiple_of with modulo operator for tick sampling

Replace `tick.is_multiple_of(N)` with `tick % N == 0` for the unbounded
memory usage sampling check. The is_multiple_of method may not be
available on all integer types in stable Rust, while the modulo operator
is universally supported and semantically identical for this use case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
